This is clearly indicating that the buses are much more expensive than regular buses, which is a significant disadvantage. The word "however" is used to contrast the benefit of zero pollution with the drawback of high cost. So, the disadvantage mentioned here is the high cost of the hydrogen-powered buses compared to common buses. Among the answer choices, option (A) is "its high cost," which matches this information. Let me check the other options to make sure. Option (C) "zero pollution" is actually mentioned as a benefit, not a disadvantage.
